# delegate

**Instance Property**

The delegate for the session object

## Declaration

```swift
weak var delegate: (any WCSessionDelegate)? { get set }
```

## Discussion

You must assign an object conforming to the [doc://com.apple.watchconnectivity/documentation/WatchConnectivity/WCSessionDelegate] protocol to this property before calling the [doc://com.apple.watchconnectivity/documentation/WatchConnectivity/WCSession/activate()] method. The delegate is responsible for responding to session-related changes, for processing incoming data, and for responding to errors.

For more information about implementing your delegate object, see [doc://com.apple.watchconnectivity/documentation/WatchConnectivity/WCSessionDelegate].

## Configuring the Session

- **activate()**: Activates the session asynchronously.
- **activationState**: The current activation state of the session.

items.description: The current activation state of the session.
